ground_truth.summary: SqliteDataRecord handling of multiple BLOB columns causes an assertion failure / wrong read.
ground_truth.caveat: reverted next day; real product logic bug in SqliteDataRecord.cs

ground_truth.summary: DeclaredOnly->FlattenHierarchy fallback in TryGetValidatableProperty does not actually fix the AmbiguousMatchException and can silently drop validation attributes depending on which hierarchy level resolves.

human_threads.note: ilonatommy: managing flow by exceptions is not preferred; explore cheaper alternatives

ground_truth.caveat: production change is ~11 lines; the rest of the diff is tests

ground_truth.summary: Handling canonical types in casting logic introduces a JIT cast failure (shared_Casts test).

human_threads.note: jkotas (principal JIT eng) design questions; +5 Copilot bot threads

ground_truth.caveat: specialized JIT/AOT casting + canonical generics domain; borderline large by real production surface

ground_truth.summary: Using the jsx language variant for jsx file scanning in getChildren causes crashes in downstream consumers (typescript-eslint, eslint-stylistic).

human_threads.note: DanielRosenwasser: declare languageVariant optional in SourceFileLike

ground_truth.caveat: bug manifests mainly downstream, not in TS's own test suite

ground_truth.summary: The stream idle-timeout starts the idle timer before yielding each chunk and leaves it running during consumer processing, so it measures consumer time and kills live streams prematurely.

human_threads.note: no human inline threads; a Copilot bot thread named the root cause

ground_truth.caveat: no human review threads (bot only); escaped-bug evidence is excellent

ground_truth.summary: Local/native copy-paste-DND rework introduced multiple regressions (eager temp-file creation blocking copy + /tmp path leak, unfiltered text/uri-list parsing, authority-only proxy routing, hardcoded path-case-sensitivity).

human_threads.note: mjbvz: temp-file eager creation / /tmp path leak; +4 Copilot bot threads

ground_truth.caveat: reverted twice for aggregate regressions; no single named bug

ground_truth.summary: Chunked remote read closes the querier too early; the returned iterators can then access memory-mapped files that have already been closed (use-after-close).

human_threads.note: no inline review comments on the PR

ground_truth.caveat: no human review threads; crispest bug ground truth of the Go-small candidates (named root cause, cross-release backports, dedicated reproducer #14599)

ground_truth.summary: The deletion/add-finalizer race protection causes e2e 'not found' errors when deleting pods (hot-loop / perma-race).

human_threads.note: deads2k/liggitt: 'so we can end up perma-racing a hot looping update?'

ground_truth.caveat: merged->reverted in one day; tightly scoped regression

ground_truth.summary: The kube-proxy node manager treats NodeIP-fetch timeouts as non-fatal and breaks backward compatibility (cloud-provider-azure).

human_threads.note: danwinship: 'this loses the timeout that the previous version had' — foreshadows the bug

ground_truth.caveat: bare revert body defers the 'why' to the take-2 PR; the reviewer comment foreshadows the regression

ground_truth.summary: The fix for #3184 regressed --line-buffered by looping read until the caller buffer is full, contrary to line-buffered semantics.

human_threads.note: solo-maintainer repo; no human inline review

ground_truth.caveat: no human review threads (repo culture); bug isolated to one of the PR's two commits

ground_truth.summary: The sharded spawn_blocking queue uses Release ordering where AcqRel is needed; programs using spawn_blocking can hang.

human_threads.note: ADD-SP flagged the exact Release-vs-AcqRel ordering during review

ground_truth.caveat: genuine correctness bug (hang); a reviewer identified the exact defect in review

ground_truth.summary: Dropping derive helpers during attribute parsing removes derive helpers from the attrs field in rustdoc JSON (regression 1.95->1.96).

human_threads.note: mejrs: the first_item_in_crate parameter is ugly; use the sourcemap

ground_truth.caveat: PARTIAL revert — undoes one commit (29e9273) of a multi-commit PR; ~270 diff lines are .stderr fixtures
